form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 7th (Fr4) over 2000m at this track, beaten 17 m by Miki's Moment (2:30.20) in 3yo+ on March 31 at $9.20. Showed ability the race before when he won by 2.25 m (Fr4) at this track (2:31.00) beating Indisposed in 3yo+ on March 29 at $4. May make his presence felt.

form.formComment: Fair run when beaten by 3.5 m finishing second behind I Can Too at this track over 2000m in a 3yo+ on March 10 at $3.10. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Rhaegal at this track over 2000m in a 3yo+ on March 29 at $2.70. In fine form. Racing well and should be in the finish again.
